brief_notes: Compact; some methods terse. Minor issue: resolution range stated as '2 and 5 A' for the 366 cases vs source 1.8-7.1 A globally. Other numbers (0.197, 0.150, p=0.0006, p=0.003, 366, 388, 10-11 iterations, 0.87 A^2, MolProbity 2.8, clash 14, chain LoQFits) all match. Generic r1..r56 citations. No figures.
